feature_name: Namer MVP - random adjective-noun pair CLI

completed_tasks.title: Add rand dependency to Cargo.toml
completed_tasks.description: Add rand = "0.9" under [dependencies] in Cargo.toml. Verify the project compiles with cargo build.

completed_tasks.title: Implement word lists, generate_name, and main in src/main.rs
completed_tasks.description: Replace the hello-world stub in src/main.rs with: (1) use rand::Rng import, (2) const ADJECTIVES array with 10+ lowercase entries, (3) const NOUNS array with 10+ lowercase entries, (4) pub fn generate_name(rng: &mut impl Rng) -> String with doc comment that picks random adjective and noun via rng.random_range() and returns them hyphen-separated, (5) fn main() that creates rand::rng(), calls generate_name, and prints via println!.

completed_tasks.title: Add unit tests for generate_name
completed_tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/main.rs with three tests using a deterministic seeded RNG: (1) test_generate_name_format, (2) test_generate_name_from_word_lists, (3) test_generate_name_deterministic. File stays under 50 lines.
